scope: single train seed, fixed monitor, fixed final checkpoint, and one fresh K8 blind pilot after M1m G1 rejected zero-parameter context-basin ranking; no formal validation, test access, checkpoint selection, or reuse of G0/G1 seeds
scientific_question: can a small neural event ranker improve the fixed cyclic anchor without erasing it, choose between source/null and an exact archival event context under one uniform sensory CE, and generalize to a fresh K8 full-sequence rollout
parent_result_boundary: signature hard was 0.7135 while current-context nearest-neighbor fell to 0.4167; oracle-best remained 0.9896, so fixed archive/value/HPC stay frozen and only legal event ranking may learn
source_conversion: parameter-free M1f with covariance-corrected content HPC ridge 0.001

architecture.name: anchored bounded-residual event ranker with explicit source/null candidate
architecture.event_detector: rising edge of causal balanced-action structural proposal
architecture.query_event: latest detected event carried across the current segment
architecture.candidate_events: detected event anchors strictly earlier than the latest event; current event is always excluded
architecture.event_feature: frozen causal Transformer pfc_hidden + action-only state + base_context + cyclic signature at each event
architecture.fixed_anchor: cyclic-signature cosine centered at the best valid candidate and divided by temperature 0.05; learned terms cannot delete this score
architecture.source_null_candidate: source M1f context is an explicit non-archival candidate scored from the latest event feature
architecture.selection: straight-through hard argmax over archival events plus source/null; forward always uses one exact context while backward uses softmax
architecture.archival_value: frozen M1f base_context at the selected earlier event; never a recursively written output context
architecture.disabled_path: force source/null at every token and reproduce frozen M1f context

allowed: sensory observations strictly before current token through causal Transformer hidden
frozen action-only state and cyclic signature
frozen base-context and Transformer activations at current/latest and earlier event anchors
forbidden_model_inputs: query, clean, conflict, return, switch, event-label, correctness, or oracle masks

checkpoint_selection: none; fixed final step 600 is the only blind candidate
trainable_scope: event feature norm, event query/key projections, four bounded residual coefficients and bias, and source/null linear scorer only; all PFC, state, context head, EC, place, address, content HPC, fusion, decoder, and archival values frozen
loss: one unweighted all-token sensory cross-entropy only
forbidden_losses: oracle context or oracle event regression
history matching, contrastive, pairwise ranking, or segment labels
query, return, conflict, event, or capacity reweighting
attention entropy, null, confidence, or gate supervision
post_result_rule: train once to fixed step600, open blind seed847151 once, and require every implementation and scientific gate; do not tune architecture, learning rate, residual scales, null initialization, curriculum, loss, threshold, or checkpoint on monitor or blind outputs
